# Patch 9.1 Digest (Jan 8, 2019)

**This is a UI/QoL patch with minimal gameplay changes.**

## Ability UI Improvements
Massive quality-of-life update adding missing information to ability tooltips and in-game displays:

**Stack/Resource Tracking:**
- Draven Adoration, Nasus Q, Veigar Passive now show current stacks
- Heimerdinger Q displays turret availability/cooldown
- Kassadin R, Kog'Maw R now show stack expiration timers
- Kayn Passive displays form availability timer
- Soraka W indicates when you can't cast due to low health

**Duration Bars Added:**
Long-duration buffs now display remaining time bars:
- Defensive abilities: Alistar E/R, Braum E, Dr. Mundo R, Jax R, Kayle E, Nasus R, Olaf W/R, Rammus Q/W/R, Renekton R, Shyvana W, Singed R, Tryndamere R
- Offensive/mobility: Master Yi R, Miss Fortune W, Sivir R, Tristana Q, Twitch Q/R, Vayne R, Viktor R, Volibear R
- Ghosts: Mordekaiser R ghost duration, Karthus Passive

**Recast Window Indicators:**
Added borders showing empowered attack/recast windows:
- Garen Q, Kassadin W, Nasus Q, Volibear Q empowered attacks
- LeBlanc W/R, Twisted Fate W/R, Zed W/R recast windows
- Riven R2, Lux E, Kha'Zix R, Gragas Q, Yasuo Q2

## Bugfixes
- **Xin Zhao R** damage normalized on multi-target hits
- **Jarvan IV Passive** no longer bypasses Pantheon Passive shield
- **Death's Dance** excessive healing vs. Tryndamere R/Anivia Passive fixed
- **Varus E** slow zone VFX now appears from fog of war
- Neeko transformation icon sticking fixed
- Sterak's Gage tooltip now shows exact shield values
- Rengar VFX restored across multiple skins

# League of Legends Patch 9.2 Digest

## Season Start & Ranked System
- **Position Ranks** now live across all regions with detailed explanation posts addressing player feedback
- **Three-split season structure** with new split-based rewards
- **Ladder changes** affecting top-tier placements and tier distribution

## New Champion
- **Sylas** revealed and added to the roster

## Gameplay Improvements

### Clarity & Signals
- **Kayn transformation pings** now communicate transformation progress to allies:
  - Ping transformation bar: shows early/midway/near-complete status
  - Ping Form buttons: indicates availability or time until unlock

### Bug Fixes (Gameplay-Impacting)
- **Fiora** W - Riposte now properly blocks Pyke R and activates in correct location during Q - Lunge
- **Kai'Sa** R - Killer Instinct can now dash to untargetable enemies
- **Mordekaiser** W - Harvester of Sorrow no longer grants double shield from Passive
- **Hail of Blades** fixed:
  - Now procs when first attack reveals camouflaged champions (Twitch, Rengar)
  - Works properly with Rek'Sai Q attacks
  - Cooldown resets correctly after Dead Man's Plate sales
- **Nidalee** basic attacks no longer cancel when Hunt activates mid-animation
- **Lux** basic attacks no longer cancel when W reaches max range
- **Jayce** ranged attack animation synchronized with actual wind-up

### Visual/Audio Restoration
- Yasuo (Base, High Noon, PROJECT): restored Q tornado VFX, E-Q combo cast VFX, R buff particles, basic attack trails
- Kled: restored basic attack audio while W on cooldown

---

**Note:** This is a small patch primarily focused on system/champion introduction and bug fixes rather than balance changes.

# League of Legends Patch 9.3 Digest

**Patch Date:** February 5, 2019

## Itemization & Meta
**Crit builds revitalized.** Core crit item changes make crit-dependent champions more satisfying to play while maintaining pro play balance. Crit users can now incorporate defensive items into their core builds without sacrificing viability.

## Champion Adjustments
**LeBlanc** - Q / Mimic'd Q mark no longer consumed when E, Mimic'd E, or Mimic'd Q would trigger it but are blocked by spell shield. (Functional fix enabling mark interaction consistency)

## System Changes

**Loading Screen Overhaul:**
- Ranked borders now dynamically reflect current rank in real-time
- Progress tracking consolidated to single bottom progress bar
- Click player cards to view additional info:
  - **Teammates:** Champion mastery, honor, ranked armor/level border
  - **Opponents:** Champion mastery, honor

## Bug Fixes
- Relic Shield no longer double-reports Spoils of War gold in post-game stats
- Aatrox base skin banner wings toggleable again
- Firecracker Vayne Prestige E projectile color adjusted for clarity vs. R basic attacks
- Nightbringer Yasuo R voiceover restored
- Profile background changes now apply immediately

---

**Summary:** This patch focuses on crit item balance for normal play viability and a meaningful loading screen UI upgrade with player information access. Minor but impactful bug fixes across champions and systems.

# League of Legends Patch 9.18 Digest

**Patch Date:** September 5, 2019

This is a **bugfix-focused patch** with no balance changes to champions, items, or systems.

## Champion Fixes

**Mobility & Mechanics:**
- Jayce's E (Acceleration Gate) now functions correctly when cast on himself
- Illaoi can no longer dash via W (Harsh Lesson) while snared/rooted
- Tahm Kench allies no longer get stuck during R (Abyssal Voyage) if Tahm is hit

**Ability Interactions:**
- Jinx's E (Flame Chompers) now properly blocks Akali's R (Perfect Execution)
- Bard's Meep cone attacks properly break spell shields
- Taliyah's Q (Threaded Volley) now consumes full mana cost after leaving Worked Ground
- Karthus's W (Wall of Pain) grants proper vision while under Passive (Death Defied)

**Quality of Life:**
- Diana's Passive (Moonsilver Blade) tooltip updates correctly on E rank-up
- Pantheon R ping now communicates which enemies are in range to teammates
- Shaco properly receives assists when enemies die shortly after W fear

**Vision:**
- Kindred's Wolf no longer grants extra non-functional vision

**Stasis:**
- Champions affected by Stasis effects no longer move during the effect

---

**Impact:** Minimal gameplay shifts. Focuses on correcting unintended interactions and improving clarity. No meta changes expected.

# League of Legends Patch 9.19 Digest

**Patch Date:** September 23, 2019

## Items
Several items received adjustments:
- **Black Cleaver, Black Spear, Bloodthirster, Dark Seal, Hex Core mk-1/mk-2, Lightbringer, Obsidian Cleaver** — Changes applied (specific stat adjustments not detailed in provided notes)

## Champion Bugfixes

**Kayle**
- Ultimate Hunter now properly reduces Divine Judgement (R) cooldown

**Shyvana**
- Retains movement speed from Burnout (W) when transforming via Dragon's Descent (R)

---

**Overall:** Minor patch focused on bugfixes and quality-of-life improvements. No major meta shifts expected.

# League of Legends Patch 9.20 Digest

**Patch Size:** Minor bugfix patch with no balance changes.

---

## Champion Fixes

**Yuumi**
- Fixed critical bug where she lost turret aggro permanently if attached ally died during Zhonya's/Stopwatch stasis

- Fixed Featherstorm (R) rotation lock being removed when cursor positioned directly below her

# League of Legends Patch 9.21 Digest

**Patch Date:** October 18, 2019

This is a **bugfix-focused patch** with no balance changes or new content.

## Champion Fixes

**Kindred** – Wolf's Frenzy now properly attacks enemies in range when Kindred isn't attacking

**Ashe** – Hawkshot vision marker no longer persists indefinitely on spotted enemies

**Qiyana** – Supreme Display of Talent VFX now properly synchronize and follow terrain outlines from enemy perspective, even in Fog of War

**Heimerdinger** – R tooltip corrected (no actual mechanic change)

**Sylas** – Hijacked Nidalee Q (Takedown) now properly deals damage

**Aurelion Sol** – Voice of Light VFX no longer globally visible in Fog of War

**Neeko** – Can now select herself to deactivate disguise (2-second cooldown)

**Kled** – No longer loses untargetable status when dismounting near turrets/walls

## System Fixes

**Vision & Objectives**
- Rift Scuttler Speed Shrine now properly reveals champions with Eyes marker
- Eye of the Herald can only be picked up by champions (fixes Yasuo R and Kayn shadow abusing pickup)

---

**Summary:** Quality-of-life patch addressing specific champion interactions and vision mechanics. No meta shifts or item/rune changes.

# League of Legends Patch 9.22 Digest

**Patch Date:** November 2, 2019

## Champion Release
**Senna** enters the Rift as a new champion. Refer to champion insights for ability details and playstyle guidance.

## Gameplay Bugfixes

**Champion Abilities**
- **Caitlyn**: Fixed Energized Passive (Rapid Firecannon, Statikk Shiv) so she no longer takes damage if her Headshot target dies before impact
- **Fizz Q**: Now properly breaks spell shields
- **Ornn R**: Second activation knockup now works correctly on nearby enemies
- **Gangplank E**: Barrels no longer trigger Teemo shrooms
- **Twisted Fate R**: No longer blocks projectiles (turret/dragon attacks) when interrupted
- **Taric R**: Cooldown tracking fixed if he dies during cast window
- **Rek'Sai R**: Mana refund now consistently works when enemies die during cast/dash
- **Syndra R**: HUD icon now correctly displays available Dark Spheres
- **Nidalee Q**: Empowered attacks now damage traps
- **Sion R**: Now casts immediately when cast outside range instead of delaying
- **Shyvana Q**: Structure attacks now properly reduce cooldown when ability is on cooldown

**Systems**
- Rift Herald trinket now has proper 1-second lockout to prevent accidental summons
- Game invites no longer disappear if owner changes modes

---

**Note:** This is a minor patch focused on Senna's release and bug corrections. No balance changes to items, runes, or systems.

# League of Legends Patch 9.23 Digest

## Dragon Soul Rebalancing
All four Dragon Soul effects received **scaling adjustments**:

- **Infernal**: Explosion damage now scales with bonus AD, AP, and bonus health
- **Mountain**: Shield values increased and now scale with stats
- **Ocean**: Healing/mana restore increased; minion/monster damage heals at 30% effectiveness
- **Cloud**: Passive movement speed unchanged (10%); ultimate MS boost cooldown reduced to 30s

## Rune System
**Keystone availability expanded** with soul scaling clarification:
- Dark Harvest souls now amplify all keystone effects
- Predator requires boots to take
- Aftershock restricted to basic ability triggers

## Map Changes
**Twisted Treeline Sunset** - Rewards for legacy players:
- 10+ games: exclusive icon
- 50+ games: exclusive emote  
- 100+ games: second exclusive icon

## Notable Bugfixes
- **Champion mechanics**: Poppy E stun interaction, Darius W vs Teemo Q, Garen Q/E lockout, Diana Conqueror stacking, Shyvana Q Conqueror stacks fixed
- **Items**: Spoils of War now procs with untargetable/stasis allies nearby
- **Gameplay**: Camera lock during death/respawn resolved; Malphite W empowered window no longer infinite

---

**Note**: This is a relatively **small patch** focused on Dragon Soul/rune tuning and targeted bugfixes rather than broad champion changes.

# League of Legends Patch 9.24 Digest

## Champion Changes
**Aphelios** released as new champion.

## Bugfixes (Gameplay-Relevant)

**Champion Mechanics**
- Teemo's E - Toxic Shot now properly triggers Dark Harvest
- Darius Q - Decimate no longer heals when hitting spell-shielded enemies with the axe handle
- Presence of Mind now grants correct mana/energy amounts per tooltip

**Elder Dragon Soul**
- Fixed Elder Dragon Soul empowered champions executing champions with untargetable passives (Zac, Anivia) — executes no longer occur
- Pet attacks (Zyra plants, Shaco boxes, Heimerdinger turrets) now properly apply The Aspect of the Dragon from Elder Dragon Soul

**Shaco Interaction**
- Killing Drakes with Shaco R - Hallucinate no longer affects soul grants, drake type spawns, or Elder Dragon spawn blocking

**Visibility**
- True Damage Ekko's moonwalk animation now only visible to him and allies (previously visible to enemies)

---

**Note:** This is a small patch focused primarily on bugfixes and Aphelios's introduction. No significant meta shifts or item/rune adjustments.

# League of Legends Patch 10.1 Digest

**Patch Date:** January 7, 2020

---

## Champions

**Sett**
- New champion release (no balance notes provided in this digest)

---

## Bugfixes

**Warwick**
- **Q - Jaws of the Beast:** Fixed mana depletion and cooldown triggering when target dies during cast animation

**Ardent Censer**
- **Unique Passive:** No longer grants bonus attack speed when shielding self (only affects allies now)

**Vision/Fog of War**
- Missile-type abilities no longer provide early warning indicators in Fog of War when they wouldn't normally be visible

---

## Summary

This is a **very small patch** focused primarily on Sett's release with minimal balance changes. The Warwick and Ardent Censer fixes address edge cases, while the vision change prevents information leakage from ability projectiles. No major item, rune, or system shifts.

# Patch 10.2 Digest

**This is a small patch focused entirely on bugfixes with no balance changes.**

## Champion Fixes

**Caitlyn**
- Removed exploit: no longer gains bonus Headshots via attack-move abuse on trapped/netted targets
- Fixed: can't attack-move trapped/netted targets while crowd controlled
- Fixed: W → Q combo no longer causes temporary attack speed reduction

**Sylas**
- W properly goes on cooldown, damages, and heals when hitting same target with E2
- Properly blocked from casting E2 after stolen ultimates (10.1 regression fix)

**Katarina**
- E no longer causes unresponsiveness after killing targets

**Pyke**
- Q no longer causes unresponsiveness

**Garen**
- Q no longer blocked by spell shields

**Darius**
- R damage always factors in Passive stacks (previously inconsistent)

**Cassiopeia**
- E heal amount corrected on large monsters

**Braum**
- E can no longer intercept Elder Dragon's fireball (was causing unintended death)

**Miss Fortune**
- Basic attacks no longer incorrectly extend Nami's Tidecaller's Blessing bonus damage

**Lux**
- E no longer reveals areas outside its range

## Item & System Fixes

**Support Items**
- Upgraded Relic Shield, Spectral Sickle, Steel Shoulderguards, Spellthief's Edge: vision range indicators now display properly
- Quest completion no longer auto-transfers when selling and repurchasing different support item

**Prototype: Omnistone**
- Predator cooldown now proper after boot upgrades

## Universal Fixes

- Forced movement CC (Taunt, Flee, Charm) no longer ignorable via out-of-range Summoner Spells
- Ability visibility/audio no longer leaks through Fog of War when cast outside player's vision

# League of Legends Patch 10.3 Digest

**Patch Date:** February 4, 2020

This is a **bug-fix focused patch** with no balance changes to champions, items, or runes.

## Key Gameplay Fixes

**Champion Mechanics**
- **Katarina**: Passive now correctly gains 2 Conqueror stacks per cast (not per target); no longer auto-attacks after Shunpo unless target in range
- **Garen**: Q no longer cancels when target teleports away
- **Braum**: Passive stun duration now properly reduced by Tenacity
- **Lux**: E now reveals brush inside damage/slow zone
- **Ornn**: Upgraded Might of the Ruined King no longer double-stacks with Blade of the Ruined King passive
- **Jayce**: R cooldown reduction from Cloud Drake now applies correctly
- **Mordekaiser**: Passive damage only occurs when active; R suppression interaction with Sett fixed; Yuumi no longer gets stuck in R during Zilean revive
- **Sett**: R interaction with Mordekaiser fixed; W-less vessel extrusion fixed

**Runes & Items**
- Grasp of Undying via Prototype: Omnistone no longer procs multiple times per rotation
- Energized passive from items/runes now properly stacks on on-hit abilities and double attacks

**Vision & Objectives**
- Blind spot near red side bottom jungle entrance resolved
- Baron no longer grants vision/damage through pit to players without direct vision
- Teemo's Q blind properly prevents critical and empowered damage
- Dead champions no longer draw turret aggro
- Rift Herald gold properly awarded at distance

**Minor Fixes**
- Infernal Soul VFX/SFX no longer visible through Fog of War
- PROJECT: Jinx SFX volume normalized

# Patch 10.4 Digest (2020-02-18)

**⚠️ Primarily a bugfix patch with minimal gameplay impact.**

## Mechanical Fixes

**Interaction Fixes:**
- Sett R + Tahm Kench W: Sett now properly suppresses Tahm during simultaneous casts
- Sett E now correctly stuns only when grabbing enemies on both sides
- Qiyana R no longer breaks Unstoppable effects (river/brush interactions fixed)
- Qiyana R + Yasuo W: Wall explosions properly blocked by Wind Wall positioning

**Ability/Rune Interactions:**
- Lee Sin abilities now properly count per-use toward Electrocute (was undercounting)
- Vi Q no longer blocks next auto from proccing runes
- Teemo R + Umbral Glaive: Triple damage now properly applies to non-revealed traps
- Guardian no longer procs from abilities that can't target allies

**Champion Bugs:**
- Wukong R properly usable after immediate cast before knockup-death
- Dr. Mundo damage penalty now correctly applies in ARAM
- Pyke, Cho'Gath, Urgot execute indicators now visible as intended
- Champions no longer T-pose when eaten by Tahm Kench W

## Polish

Minor visual fixes for PROJECT skins (Pyke W, Vayne R overlays) and Pulsefire Caitlyn R UI.

---

**Takeaway:** This patch targets niche interactions and mechanical consistency rather than balance shifts. No meta-relevant changes.

# League of Legends Patch 10.6 Digest

**Patch Date:** March 17, 2020

This is a **bugfix-focused patch** with no balance changes to champions, items, or runes.

## Champion Fixes

- **Rek'Sai**: R - Void Rush no longer grants 3s CC immunity when leaping on clones
- **Miss Fortune / Syndra / Varus**: E/Q abilities now cast at correct max range immediately after Flash
- **LeBlanc**: No longer returns to W - Distortion marker when suppressed by Sett's R - The Show Stopper
- **Gangplank**: Q - Parrrley now properly grants bonus gold/Silver Serpents when Statikk Shiv lightning kills targets
- **Mordekaiser**: R - Realm of Death no longer deals extra 10% max health damage on full-health targets

## System & Item Fixes

- **Omnivamp / Spellvamp**: Now properly heal through shields
- **Manaflow Band**: Consistently procs when ability hits enemy champions

## UI/Eternals Fixes

- Eternals milestone callouts no longer disappear when entering combat
- Enemy Eternals milestones respect "Self + Allies Only" setting
- Milestone Display settings persist between sessions

- Fast Forward time by 600s (in addition to existing 30s option)
- Spawn Baron Nashor and Rift Herald on demand

# League of Legends Patch 10.12 Digest

**Patch Date:** June 9, 2020

## Map Changes

**Infernal Soul Terrain**
- New Blast Cones added near tri-bushes (Gromp side), Wolf Camp, base gates, and alcoves
- Improved gank setup and escape routes

**Cloud Soul Terrain**
- Scryer's Blooms added in front of base gates and river tri-bushes
- **Speed Zones buffed:** Now grant 35% movement speed when out of combat vs. champions (up from 20% always)
- Conditional speed is more impactful for teamfights and rotations

## Notable Bugfixes (Gameplay-Relevant)

**Champion Mechanics**
